raw_consumer_statement:
I was charged {$180.00} for a mandatory filing of Beneficial Ownership Information Registration by XXXX This website is fraudulently charging for something which is supposed to be free on the government website finCENXXXX. The idea of BOIR is to prevent financial crimes against small businesses. It is ironic that small businesses like mine are duped into paying these fraudulent fees through companies which prey on gullible people who do not have adequate time to research them. And all because Credit Card companies are facilitating and legitimizing their activities. Ive asked American Express credit card to refund the money but it refused saying that the filing was successful. 
It does not recognize that the filing is free if only I went on the finCENXXXX website. 
I suggest CFPB should warn Credit Card companies to stop the transactions of these companies scamming individuals and businesses by fraudulent means. 
Otherwise, all efforts by agencies like yours will never be able to help
